productDisplayName: Fastrack Women Polyester Black Sling Bag
description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this red gym satchel from fastrack will come in handy! Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your training gear when you hit the gym. And don't you be deceived by its compact look, for there's ample space to hold all your essentials! Height: 28 cm Width: 36 cm Depth at base: 14.5 cm Made of nylon for durability and comfort One large zippered compartment with a small zippered pocket and organiser pouches for your mobile and to stash away essentials Two side pockets and two short handles for carrying ease One compartment on the front with a press buttoned closure Single, removable and adjustable strap to hang the bag from the shoulder Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long life Brand name printed on the front Brand tab appliqué d on the side Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
